name: Kevan Parekh
role: Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer
bio: Kevan Parekh joined Apple in June 2013 and was promoted to Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer in January 2025, succeeding Luca Maestri. He oversees accounting, financial planning and analysis, treasury, investor relations, internal audit, and tax. Previous Apple roles include Vice President, Financial Planning and Analysis.

footnotes: FY2025 salary of $891,519 reflects a mid-year promotion to CFO (effective January 2025); the figure blends his prior Vice President base with the elevated CFO base. FY2025 long-term equity target was $16.75M (vs. $20M for the other Senior Vice President NEOs).

Non-Equity Incentive reflects the Cash Incentive Plan payout. In FY2025, Apple exceeded the maximum performance goals for both net sales and operating income, resulting in maximum payout for each NEO.

components.label: Estimated total value of equity acceleration (RSUs at $255.46 FY-end close plus accumulated dividend equivalents)
